title: SoundHound (SOUN) Upgraded to 'Buy' by Ladenburg After Strong Q2 and Amelia Acquisition
text: On August 11, 2025, Ladenburg Thalmann elevated SoundHound AI from a neutral stance to a buy rating, raising its price target from $9 to $16. The analyst attributed this positive reassessment to the company's robust second-quarter performance and strategic acquisition of Amelia. The recent Amelia acquisition significantly strengthened SoundHound's conversational AI capabilities. According to the analysis, the investment expanded the platform's technical foundation while the concurrent launch of Vision AI differentiated the offering in the competitive landscape. Ladenburg identified multiple growth drivers: momentum across multiple segments, including enterprise voice AI, automotive integrations, and restaurant partnerships. The firm projects SoundHound will achieve over $270 million in revenue by 2027 with double-digit adjusted EBITDA margins. While acknowledging the company's elevated 22x enterprise value-to-revenue multiple as a concern, analysts determined the long-term upside potential justifies current valuation levels based on improving revenue visibility and expanding deal flow.
